scripts.lint:linux: go fmt ./... && go vet ./... && (command -v golangci-lint >/dev/null && golangci-lint run || echo 'skip golangci-lint')
scripts.lint:win: go fmt ./... && go vet ./... && (where golangci-lint && golangci-lint run || echo 'skip golangci-lint')
scripts.lint:fix: go fmt ./... && go vet ./... && golangci-lint run --fix
